headlines.headline: Wrelal Financial misses quarterly revenue estimates by 10%

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% revenue miss is a significant negative indicator of current financial performance and market demand.

headlines.headline: Wrelal Financial secures $50M contract with a top-tier research institute

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
